book.title: The Great Gatsby
book.author: F. Scott Fitzgerald
book.description: A tragic story of wealth, obsession, and the American Dream set in the Roaring Twenties.

book.author: George Orwell
book.description: A chilling depiction of totalitarianism, surveillance, and the loss of individual freedom.

book.title: To Kill a Mockingbird
book.author: Harper Lee
book.description: A powerful story about justice, racism, and moral growth in the American South.

book.title: The Hobbit
book.author: J.R.R. Tolkien
book.description: A magical adventure following Bilbo Baggins on a dangerous quest filled with treasure and dragons.

book.title: Pride and Prejudice
book.author: Jane Austen
book.description: A witty and romantic story about Elizabeth Bennet navigating love, family, and social expectations.

book.title: The Catcher in the Rye
book.author: J.D. Salinger
book.description: A coming-of-age story following Holden Caulfield as he struggles with identity, growing up, and belonging.

book.title: The Alchemist
book.author: Paulo Coelho
book.description: A philosophical tale about following your dreams and listening to your heart’s true desires.

book.title: The Lord of the Rings
book.author: J.R.R. Tolkien
book.description: An epic saga of friendship, courage, and the battle between good and evil in Middle-earth.

book.title: Harry Potter and the Philosopher's Stone
book.author: J.K. Rowling
book.description: The beginning of Harry's magical journey as he discovers Hogwarts and faces the return of dark forces.

book.title: Harry Potter and the Goblet of Fire
book.author: J.K. Rowling
book.description: Harry enters the dangerous Triwizard Tournament, uncovering secrets and facing dark magic.

book.title: Harry Potter and the Deathly Hallows
book.author: J.K. Rowling
book.description: The final battle against Voldemort as Harry and friends risk everything to save the wizarding world.

book.title: My Best Friend's Exorcism
book.author: Grady Hendrix
book.description: A darkly funny horror story about friendship tested by a terrifying demonic possession.

book.title: Dracula
book.author: Bram Stoker
book.description: The classic tale of Count Dracula, blending fear, mystery, and gothic suspense.

book.title: Alice's Adventures in Wonderland
book.author: Lewis Carroll
book.description: A whimsical journey into a bizarre, dream-like world filled with curious characters and wild imagination.

book.title: The Shining
book.author: Stephen King
book.description: A psychological horror story about a family isolated in the haunted Overlook Hotel as dark forces consume the father.

book.title: Romeo and Juliet
book.author: William Shakespeare
book.description: A timeless tragic romance about two young lovers whose families' feud leads to heartbreak and fate-driven consequences.
